summary: WASI project audit reveals critical build failure and high-priority frontend typo. Core routing and DEX functionality are operational, but production build is broken and order form has a critical typo preventing ETF selection.

critical.issue: npm build command fails with exit code -1
critical.why: Production build is completely broken, preventing deployment
critical.fix: Investigate build logs, fix missing dependencies or configuration errors in build process

high.issue: Critical typo in DEX order form ETF selection
high.why: Users cannot select ETFs due to undefined variable 'orderFor' instead of 'orderForm'
high.fix: Change 'orderFor' to 'orderForm' in the ETF select element's value and onChange handlers

high.issue: API URL storage key inconsistency between DEX and banking
high.why: DEX uses 'WASI_DEX_API_URL' while banking uses 'WASI_BANKING_API_URL', causing confusion and potential connection issues
high.fix: Standardize on single storage key 'WASI_API_URL' across all API clients

medium.issue: Stale localStorage URL handling has edge cases
medium.why: index.html logic may not handle all scenarios of stale or invalid API URLs, potentially leaving users with broken connections
medium.fix: Add more robust validation and fallback logic for stored API URLs

medium.issue: Missing error boundaries in React components
medium.why: Frontend errors could crash entire app without graceful degradation
medium.fix: Add error boundaries at app and component levels

low.issue: Inconsistent API base URL resolution patterns
low.why: Multiple different patterns for resolving API URLs across files creates maintenance overhead
low.fix: Create shared utility for API URL resolution

missing_features.expected: Computed runtimeDexCount should match seeded count

regressions.evidence: Typo 'orderFor' instead of 'orderForm' in DexApp.jsx line ~447

next_actions: Fix critical typo in src/dex/DexApp.jsx (orderFor → orderForm)
Investigate and fix npm build failure
Standardize API URL storage keys across all clients
Add error boundaries to React components
